paragraphs: The macro regime flipped overnight on US-Iran de-escalation progress. Polymarket priced the peace deal probability up 20 points to 36.5% YES, the airspace closure trigger resolved NO, and breadth ran 17 of 20 majors green from yesterday's 3 of 20. BTC bounced to $77K with HYPE +12.3% leading and EIGEN +16.3% on its acquisition catalyst. Fear and Greed sits pinned at 25 — sentiment hasn't caught the regime change.

Perps funding map shows BSB at +0.094%/8h extreme high and GMT at -0.20%/8h heaviest short premium by a 14-times margin over the second-heaviest negative print. Top-trader long/short spreads tell the same story across heavy movers — GMT down 0.68, BEAT down 0.53, BSB down 0.24 over seven days. Smart money is exiting the heaviest 7d movers while retail funds the leverage stack. HYPE at +0.08 over the week stands as the exception alongside its $1B fee-funded buyback program.

Privacy/ZK promoted to RISING in narrative-tracker after five days absent. RAIL printed +41% today, Aleo with Ledger Private DeFi extends the rotation, ZEC bounced through the prior short trigger. AI agents and Decentralized compute both hold PEAK with 5-of-5 RIDE calls. The sector rotation map reset alongside the macro flip — established privacy leader and AI-compute infrastructure both find fresh institutional bids.
market_sentiment.bias_line: Bias · cautiously risk-on. Long the catalyst-supported AI/compute leader (EIGEN), fold the ZEC short on the narrative reversal, hold HYPE through fundamental strength. Stay measured on entry size — the crowd still reads as fearful so positioning extremes have not yet built.

current_positions.thesis_note: Horizon reached on Day 3/3 with the position in the green. AI agents and Decentralized compute both hold PEAK 5/5 RIDE — the sector thesis worked.

HYPE closed +12.3% on the day on $931M volume and sits near the prior ATH at $61.71. AIXBT reframed the thesis from ETF filings to $1B fee-funded buybacks plus 16% futures market share against Binance — revenue and competitive displacement now replace the announcement-driven story.
current_positions.watch: Top L/S 1.33 up 0.08 over 7 days — smart money still building. Narrative-tracker has Hyperliquid at FADING 3/5 today; watch for divergence between the price strength and the narrative cool-off. The June 6 unlock at $575M sits 13 days out.

current_positions.thesis_note: Daily close at $634.46 cleared the $620 invalidation. Privacy/ZK promoted from FADING to RISING in narrative-tracker on the same session — the carrier rebuilt with three distinct drivers (Aleo, Ledger Private DeFi, ZK-rollup wave). Cross-feed signal flipped against the short.

BCH still appears on token-movers losers list at -2.3% on the day and -15.0% over the week — the cleanest structural bleed on a tape where 17 of 20 majors ran green. The smart-money long-side exit (top L/S -1.43 over 7d at fire) has not reversed. Continuation thesis intact.
current_positions.watch: Position underwater at -2.49% as BCH absorbed the broader risk-on bounce. Relative weakness against majors continues to validate the short. Watch for a clean break of $360 to confirm; an upside displacement through $370 invalidates.

current_positions.thesis_note: GENIUS dropped off today's monitor-runners top 5 — the on-chain BSC name-farm attention rotated to the Solana SAOS cluster instead. The capitulation thesis (CAPITULATION-shaped flow plus smart-money exit plus funding flip negative) holds without a new bid arriving.
current_positions.watch: No GENIUS perps data in today's universe — relying on the cooling on-chain attention as the structural read. Watch for any return to monitor-runners top 5 or a token-movers listing as an early reversal signal. The horizon expires tomorrow.

thesis: EIGEN closed +16.3% today on $37M in volume with turnover at 22% of market cap — high participation backs the move with real flow rather than thin-float momentum. The asset outpaced BTC's +2.1% recovery by 14 points on the day.

Nebius announced a $643M acquisition of Eigen AI yesterday, folding the MIT inference team into the EigenCloud Token Factory platform. The May 11 rebrand from EigenLayer to EigenCloud reframes the token as compute-platform exposure, not restaking-only.

Narrative-tracker has AI agents and Decentralized compute both at PEAK with full 5-of-5 RIDE calls. The sector that anchored the past week extends through institutional sub-threads — a16z's fund pivot to adoption infrastructure, the Nvidia Vera positioning thread.

The macro regime flipped overnight on US-Iran de-escalation. Breadth ran 17 of 20 majors green from yesterday's 3 of 20 while Fear and Greed stayed pinned at 25 — the crowd has not yet repriced the regime change so positioning extremes have not built.
risks: Restaking-sector unlock wave dumped over $330M across the cohort in late April and the schedule extends into Q2. Fresh unlock cliffs land directly into the acquisition-catalyst window.
Restaking architecture carries security overhang from prior AVS slashing incidents. A fresh security event flips this name to risk-off ahead of any other AI-sector dump.
The macro regime flip is fresh — if US-Iran deal momentum stalls before May 31, the risk-on tape reverses and the breadth-driven bid evaporates fast.

watchlist.trigger: taker buy clears 52% with open interest continuing to build, OR pct_24h breaks +10% with funding holding under +0.02%/8h
watchlist.invalidation: close below $275 OR funding flips negative
thesis: TAO holds NEUTRAL on today's perps scan with open interest building 6.6% over the week on a tight 16% range. Funding at +0.004%/8h sits above the 7-day average — fresh longs paying premium into the consolidation.

Narrative-tracker keeps AI agents and Decentralized compute both at PEAK with full 5-of-5 RIDE calls. TAO names alongside the institutional compute bid via the a16z fund pivot and the Nvidia Vera positioning thread.

The DIVERGENT pattern sub-tag reads as passive accumulation, possibly arbitrage flow rather than directional demand. The trigger fires when taker buy crosses 52% to confirm aggressive intent in the order book.

watchlist.trigger: liquidations print past $2M with funding holding negative, OR fresh -10% day with open interest extending lower
thesis: EDEN closed -6.86% today, slipping 3.14pp inside the -10% drawdown gate that fires CAPITULATION. Yesterday cleared three of four CAPITULATION conditions; today the regime now fails on two fronts.
Liquidations at $130K against the 7-day 75th-percentile of $2.1M sits at 6% of threshold. The cascade exhausted earlier in the week and structure rebuilt slowly without delivering the flush.
Top-trader long/short ratio at 1.29 fell 0.37 over seven days — smart money still exiting. A second flush leg with liquidations clearing $2M completes the CAPITULATION setup.

watchlist.trigger: first pullback to $620 that holds with funding turning positive AND top-trader long/short ratio rotating back above 1.00
thesis: Narrative-tracker promoted Privacy/ZK to RISING today after five sessions absent from drivers. The carrier names three distinct threads — Aleo plus Ledger Private DeFi, the ZK-rollup wave, the ZEC tape cracking yesterday — the narrative reassembles after the leader broke.

Top-trader long/short ratio sits at 0.76 — already net short on the perps. Funding negative at -0.0034%/8h. The squeeze setup is loaded if the narrative reassembly pulls the bid back to the established privacy leader.
RAIL printed +41% today on the same Privacy/ZK rotation map. The sector is finding multiple destinations beyond ZEC, which extends the sector bid but also fragments capital across alternatives.

watchlist.trigger: pct_24h prints green +5% with open interest rolling further negative AND short liquidations clear the 7d 75th-percentile of $81K
thesis: GMT funding sits at -0.204%/8h — the heaviest short premium in today's perps universe by a 14-times margin over the second-heaviest negative print. Shorts paid sharply more premium this slice than they did across the prior week.

Top-trader long/short ratio collapsed 0.68 points over seven days to 1.20. Smart money joined the short side alongside the retail crowd — both sides crowded short is asymmetric squeeze structure if any bid arrives.

Spot premium reads basis +0.34% positive into deeply negative funding. Spot is still bidding the asset while futures shorts hold the line. A funding flush without spot weakness fires the short-cover cascade.

watchlist.trigger: pct_24h reverses to flat-to-red with funding holding above +0.08%/8h
thesis: BSB funding repriced from +0.056%/8h yesterday to +0.094%/8h today — a 0.038pp jump that cleared the DISTRIBUTION trigger of +0.08%/8h. Today's gains-still-accelerating reading blocked the regime fire on the thinnest margin in today's universe.

Top-trader long/short ratio at 2.00 fell 0.24 over seven days while open interest built 83.6%. Smart money exited 12% of their long conviction this week as retail piled premium-paying leverage into the move.
Liquidations at $318K against the 7d 75th-percentile of $3.3M leaves heavy unwound leverage on the stack. A reversal day fires the LONG-TRAP pattern with cascade room beneath.

evaluations.note: Day 3/3. Horizon reached. +2.45% from fire, +3.00pp vs BTC, +2.72pp vs ETH. AI agents and Decentralized compute both hold PEAK 5/5 RIDE — the sector thesis worked. WIN.

Day 3/multi-week. +1.27% from fire, well above the $54 revised invalidation. HYPE printed +12.3% on $931M volume on the same day BTC bounced 2.1% — 10pp of relative strength. AIXBT reframed the thesis from ETF filings to $1B fee-funded buybacks plus 16% futures market share against Binance. Narrative-tracker FADING 3/5 but price disagrees; per soul, price wins commentary.

Day 2/7. Daily close $634.46 cleared the $620 invalidation. Same session: Privacy/ZK promoted FADING to RISING in narrative-tracker with three distinct drivers (Aleo, Ledger Private DeFi, ZK-rollup wave). Cross-feed signal flipped against the short. -7.33% return, -5.11pp vs BTC, -4.06pp vs ETH. LOSS.

Day 2/7. Position -2.49% adverse as BCH absorbed the broader risk-on bounce. Still appears on token-movers losers list at -2.3% 24h, -15.0% 7d — the cleanest structural bleed on a day 17 of 20 majors ran green. Smart-money exit thesis intact. Invalidation $370 holds. RIDE.

Day 2/3. No GENIUS perps data in today's universe — price_at_eval is an estimate from the on-chain context (dropped off monitor-runners top 5, attention rotated to the Solana SAOS cluster). Capitulation thesis intact: smart-money exit and funding flip negative remain the structural reads. Horizon expires tomorrow.

close.close_reason: horizon reached on Day 3/3 with position in the green; sector thesis (AI agents + DePIN PEAK) intact
invalidation $620 breached on daily close; Privacy/ZK narrative promoted FADING to RISING in same session, cross-feed flipped against the short

AVS slashing overhang — fresh security event flips this name to risk-off ahead of other AI dumps.
Macro regime flip is fresh — if US-Iran deal stalls before May 31, the breadth-driven bid evaporates.

Negative funding can persist for weeks without resolution — the asymmetric setup decays slowly.
